description: A raster map displaying the spatial distribution of quantitative intensity values over an unlabelled geographic area. The colour gradient ranges from dark blue (lowest intensity) to light blue, cyan, and yellowish-green (highest intensity). The map includes a white north arrow at the top left and a scale bar at the bottom left, indicating a distance from 0 to 200 m. Five irregularly shaped polygons, outlined in yellow, highlight specific areas that exhibit higher intensity values compared to their immediate surroundings. The exact metric represented by the intensity values, the geographic location, the data source, and the reference year are not provided in the image.
